info.title: Scrape Creators API
info.description: The easiest way to scrape public social media data at scale. Extract profiles, posts, videos, comments, and more from TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook, Reddit, and 15+ platforms.

tags.name: YouTube
tags.description: Scrape YouTube channels, videos, and more

get.description: Get comprehensive channel information including stats and metadata. Can pass channelId, handle, or url.

parameters.name: channelId
parameters.description: YouTube channel ID. Can pass a channelId, handle or url

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: YouTube channel handle. Can pass a channelId, handle or url

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: YouTube channel URL. Can pass a channelId, handle or url
